name: Kickoff Carnage: Opening Results and Three Red Cards
angle: Funny/ironic hook: the very first game of the 2026 World Cup, Mexico's home opener, made history for the wrong reason — three players were sent off, the most red cards ever in a World Cup match, leaving South Africa with nine men in a 2-0 defeat. Quiz built on the real opening results so far.

questions.question: Mexico beat South Africa in the 2026 World Cup opener. What was the final score?
The opening game set an unwanted record. How many players were sent off in Mexico v South Africa?
After all those red cards, how many players did South Africa finish the opening match with?
Who scored the very first goal of the 2026 World Cup, inside ten minutes of the opener?
Which veteran striker scored Mexico's second goal in the 2-0 win over South Africa?
Hosts the USA hammered Paraguay 4-1 in their opener. How many goals did the USA score?
Co-hosts Canada were held to a draw by Bosnia and Herzegovina in their first game. What was the score?
South Korea opened with a 2-1 win on day one. Which European side did they beat?
Who are the reigning world champions heading into the 2026 World Cup?
How many teams are at the 2026 World Cup, the most ever?
Three countries are co-hosting the 2026 World Cup. Which three?
Mexico's opening match was played at Mexico City's most famous stadium, known as the...?
Where will the 2026 World Cup final be played, just outside New York?
Which country has won the most World Cups, with five titles?
Which legend is the only player to win the World Cup three times?

sources: https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49033183/mexico-south-africa-2026-world-cup-azetca-opening-game (record three red cards; South Africa down to nine men; Quinones opener, Jimenez second)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49027532/world-cup-2026-var-review-red-card-penalty-handball-goal-line-technology (VAR review of the three red cards: Sithole and Zwane for South Africa, Cesar Montes for Mexico)
https://www.cbssports.com/soccer/news/world-cup-group-standings-table-results/ (results: Mexico 2-0 South Africa; South Korea 2-1 Czechia; Canada 1-1 Bosnia and Herzegovina; USA 4-1 Paraguay)
https://www.olympics.com/en/news/fifa-world-cup-2026-every-match-result-friday-12-june-live-scores (Friday 12 June results: Canada v Bosnia, USA v Paraguay)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup (three hosts USA/Canada/Mexico; 48 teams; opener at Estadio Azteca; final at MetLife Stadium, New Jersey; 4 matches / 12 goals after 12 June)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pele (only player to win three World Cups)
